title: orthochilus rutenbergianus
intro: Orthochilus rutenbergianus, also known as Rutenberg's Orthochilus, is a species of orchid native to East Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Orthochilus rutenbergianus include the potential treatment of fever, headache, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve boiling the roots and leaves to create a tea or decoction that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
